title: Cancellation scopes should contain checkpoints
description: Checks if the cancellation scope does not contain any checkpoints.
message: The cancellation scope should contain a checkpoint.
recommendation: Add a checkpoint to the cancellation scope.

noncompliant.code:
async with cancel_token:
    for i in range(10):
        await some_task()
        cancel_token.cancel()

compliant.code:
async with cancel_token, checkpoint:
    for i in range(10):
        await some_task()
        cancel_token.cancel()
        await checkpoint.wait()

why_is_this_an_issue: Missing checkpoints in cancellation scopes can lead to resource usage beyond the desired scope when tasks are canceled.
how_to_fix: Add a checkpoint after each task in the cancellation scope.
